name: Bruschetta
recipeIngredient: 1 large can of whole tomatoes, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the tomatoes.
2. Add the chopped basil and mince or crush the garlic to taste.
3. Mix in 1 tablespoon of chopped red onion if using.
4. Add approximately 1 teaspoon of balsamic vinegar and season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Serve on Italian or French bread.
